title: taraxacum lineare
intro: Taraxacum lineare, also known as narrow-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals such as potassium and iron. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum lineare are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum lineare, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
